Self-similarity matrices at 5 granularities

Same position-aligned chord-tone dot product as before, now aggregated into 1 / 2 / 4 / 8 / 16-bar blocks before comparing (each block's vector is the concatenation of its member bars, not a pooled sum — see scratchpad/chord_distance_eval.py's block_sim()). 1-bar is the finest possible resolution (identical to the plain bar-vs-bar matrix, verified to match exactly); 16-bar approaches whole-section comparison. Watch how the AABC block structure sharpens, then collapses to a coarse 2x2 or so as blocks get big enough to span multiple sections.

Data: scratchpad/bar_ssm_multigrain_all_of_me.json, scratchpad/bar_ssm_multigrain_aretha_chain_of_fools.json.
